response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.15 below threshold while our policy requires 0.4 minimum; island-wide scarcity and mutual rejection patterns indicate self-preservation is critical—cannot share without risking our own reserve adequacy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
